title: AoE3 Mod Launcher — translation.json
description: Manifest shipped INSIDE every translation pack and committed next to the pack's .zip under translations/<id>/ on main. Usually generated by the launcher's Settings → Packager (don't hand-write the hashes).

id.description: Short pack id, also the folder name under translations/. e.g. "es", "es-419", "fr".

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the launcher's language menu.

language.description: Optional BCP-47-style locale tag (informational). Defaults to id.

version.description: Human pack version (e.g. "1.0"). Shown to users. NOT used for dedup — that's contentHash.

compatibleWith.description: Mod versions the translator tested this pack against (exact membership, no ranges). The MD5 hash check at apply time is the final authority.

files.description: The translated files this pack ships.

path.description: Install-relative path with forward slashes, e.g. "data/stringtabley.xml".

originalHash.description: MD5 of the canonical English file the translator started from.

translatedHash.description: MD5 of the translated file shipped in the .zip.

contentHash.description: Fingerprint of the pack derived from files[].translatedHash (written by the packager). Drives the launcher's id@contentHash dedup key — a changed pack re-notifies users with NO version bump and NO release tag. Recompute if you hand-edit files.

zip.description: Filename of the pack's .zip in the SAME folder as this manifest, so the launcher can build the raw-CDN download URL. Defaults to <id>.zip.

date.description: ISO-8601 UTC build timestamp (the packager stamps it). Orders a translation's version history newest-first; for the layout translations/<id>/<version>/, the newest version is what the menu/notification use.

description.description: Optional free-form description / changelog shown in the apply dialog.

targetMod.description: Mod id this pack targets (e.g. "wol"). Guards against applying a pack to the wrong mod. Empty = unverified (allowed).
